non_blocking_findings: The Route Oracle 0.4 threshold profile retains the route-oracle-v0.3-default name without using a Route Oracle 0.3 executable or result identity.
The locked Ubuntu base-image digest resolves to a multi-architecture manifest that includes arm64, but this does not establish the full qualification image identity.
The host ros2 help command succeeds under ROS Humble, which remains outside the selected qualification environment.
Independent cleanup, residual-process, UDP/TCP 8888, evidence, and safety fixtures reject their tested negative paths without terminating processes.
blocker_summary: The runner does not accept the required APPROVE_QUALIFICATION_ONLY decision/status contract and its decision-file hash check is incompatible with a later identity-lock edit.
The runner does not require the authorization decision and ledger to be the exact pushed origin/main identities.
The scenario entries do not invoke every per-slot collector and Oracle declared by the implementation manifest.
The scenario entries do not produce the safety, cleanup, and compact-evidence inputs required by the runner post-path.
Safety checks run only after the flight scenario subprocess returns and therefore do not provide integrated runtime safety monitoring.
The environment lock identifies only a base image while ROS, Gazebo, Python packages, and the complete qualification image remain unlocked.
The selected ROS Jazzy container and required imports could not be independently executed or confirmed; the available host is ROS Humble and px4_ros2_interface_lib import is unavailable.
The C1 slot defaults to ignored Humble-built DDS and adapter binaries that are not bound by the manifest; the Jazzy workspace lacks the C1 executable.
The runner launches before any append-only qualification-ledger registration and contains no accepted/rejected attempt accounting update path.
required_independent_action: Create an independent blocker-resolution amendment for the new review findings without changing the frozen research design.
next_exact_action: create an independent blocker-resolution amendment for the new review findings
